name: Penne Puttanesca
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Penne pasta (or ziti or mostaccioli)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
2. In a large skillet, heat a splash of olive oil over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
3. Stir in crushed tomatoes, capers, olives, red onions, anchovy fillets, and Italian seasoning. Simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Drain the pasta and add it to the skillet with the sauce. Toss to coat evenly.
5. Grate Parmesan over the pasta and toss again until well combined.
6. Adjust seasoning if needed and serve hot.
